description_long: This lamppost features a classic, ornamental design with a central vertical post topped by a pointed finial. Extending horizontally from the central shaft is a decorative wrought-iron crossbar adorned with intricate scrollwork. Suspended from each end of the crossbar are two lantern-style light fixtures, each encased in a metal frame with glass panels and hanging by short chains. The base is square and robust, providing stability and a sense of permanence. The overall color palette is a mix of dark iron and weathered metallic tones, giving it an antique, Victorian-inspired appearance. The lamppost is both functional and decorative, suitable for parks, boulevards, or historic urban settings.
description: A decorative, wrought-iron lamppost with two hanging lanterns and ornate scrollwork, finished in dark metallic tones.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the crossbar, both lanterns, and the detailed scrollwork.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the narrow profile of the post and the depth of the lanterns, with scrollwork visible in profile.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, displaying both lanterns and the ornamental crossbar.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the slim profile and lantern depth.
attribute_lamp_head_design: Victorian-style lanterns with metal frames and glass panels, suspended by chains
